subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One maketh mention of His remembrance from the presence of God, the Protector, the Self-Subsisting, unto him who hath hearkened unto the Call and turned towards it when it arose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر ذکره المظلوم من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم لمن سمع الندآء و اقبل اذ کان
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @prayer for service, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment
